mapper.insert: INSERT INTO panel ( site_id, name, device_serial, m_no, installed_at, status, is_online, circuit_count, leak_ma_threshold, temp_threshold, humidity_threshold, overcurrent_threshold, gas_threshold, fire_threshold ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{name}, #{deviceSerial}, #{mNo}, #{installedAt}, #{status}, #{isOnline}, #{circuitCount}, #{leakMaThreshold}, #{tempThreshold}, #{humidityThreshold}, #{overcurrentThreshold}, #{gasThreshold}, #{fireThreshold} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.panel_id, p.site_id, p.name, p.device_serial, p.m_no, p.installed_at, p.status, p.is_online, p.last_communicated_at, p.circuit_count, p.leak_ma_threshold, p.temp_threshold, p.humidity_threshold, p.overcurrent_threshold, p.gas_threshold, p.fire_threshold, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE p.panel_id = #{panelId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.panel_id, p.site_id, p.name, p.device_serial, p.m_no, p.installed_at, p.status, p.is_online, p.last_communicated_at, p.circuit_count, p.leak_ma_threshold, p.temp_threshold, p.humidity_threshold, p.overcurrent_threshold, p.gas_threshold, p.fire_threshold, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE p.m_no = #{mNo} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE panel SET name = #{name}, device_serial = #{deviceSerial}, m_no = #{mNo}, installed_at = #{installedAt}, circuit_count = #{circuitCount}, leak_ma_threshold = #{leakMaThreshold}, temp_threshold = #{tempThreshold}, humidity_threshold = #{humidityThreshold}, overcurrent_threshold = #{overcurrentThreshold}, gas_threshold = #{gasThreshold}, fire_threshold = #{fireThreshold}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE panel_id = #{panelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE panel SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE panel_id = #{panelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE panel SET is_online = 1, last_communicated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE panel_id = #{panelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT sf.frame_id, sf.panel_id, sf.received_at, sf.mode, sf.volt_v, sf.leak_ma, sf.temperature, sf.humidity, sf.fire_raw, sf.gas_raw, sf.error_bits, sf.door_status, sf.total_current, sf.total_power FROM sensor_frame sf WHERE sf.panel_id = #{panelId} ORDER BY sf.frame_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.circuit_id, c.channel_no, c.load_type, latest_sfc.current_a, latest_sfc.arc_counter, latest_sfc.device_arc_flag, latest_ai.verdict AS latest_ai_verdict FROM circuit c LEFT JOIN sensor_frame_circuit latest_sfc ON latest_sfc.reading_id = ( SELECT MAX(sfc.reading_id) FROM sensor_frame_circuit sfc WHERE sfc.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ) LEFT JOIN ai_diagnosis_result latest_ai ON latest_ai.result_id = ( SELECT MAX(ai.result_id) FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai WHERE ai.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ) WHERE c.panel_id = #{panelId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.channel_no ASC
SELECT a.alert_id, a.type, a.triggered_at FROM alert a WHERE a.panel_id = #{panelId} ORDER BY a.triggered_at DESC, a.alert_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
